_comment: Example REMOTE / TEAM configuration for the Chaos MCP server over Streamable HTTP.
Cursor only auto-loads `.cursor/mcp.json`, so copy the entry below into that file
(replacing the local stdio entry) to use a shared, hosted Chaos MCP server.
Run the server in HTTP mode on the host:
Each Cursor client then passes its OWN scoped scheduler key via the Authorization
header; the server forwards it to the REST API (falling back to its configured key).
